data.example: validate ctor -> vectorised causal signal -> _clip -> REGISTRY -> simulations MODE_PARAMS + benchmark spec (rebalance_every by horizon: 1 daily / 5 weekly / 21 monthly) -> tests: shape/bounds/validation + behavioral + (if a kernel) equivalence-to-reference.
data.name: Checklist for adding a strategy mode

data.location: autvestor/benchmarks/ — runner.py (head-to-head money/Calmar ranking incl. combos + copy_demo_experts), stats.py (Deflated Sharpe, bootstrap, walk-forward/purged k-fold); autvestor/simulations/ mode-combination grid.
data.name: Benchmark + significance harness

data.statement: Signals must be causal: row t uses only data <= t; refit windows exclude the target; performance-weighting uses only outcomes realized by t. Clip signals via modes.base._clip.

data.rationale: weight_smoothing glides part-way to each new target (Garleanu-Pedersen 'trade toward the aim') instead of chasing every signal swing; cuts turnover/fees ~7x and rescues most active-method edge without changing signals. Opt-in per native horizon (fast/turnover-heavy methods smooth; slow monthly methods do not, to avoid over-damping).
data.title: Per-method cost-aware target smoothing

data.location: autvestor/data/ — synthetic default (offline) + market_api.py Yahoo fetcher (dividend-adjusted adjclose); autvestor/cache.py cached(key,producer,ttl): Redis when AUTVESTOR_REDIS_URL set, else in-process TTL. Disk reserved for permanent artifacts.
data.name: Market data + cache

data.example: After README/docs edits run `python docs/build_docs.py` to regenerate docs/index.html and commit it. Method formulas+sources live in docs/methods.md; auth/db/live in docs/trading.md.
data.name: Regenerate the docs hub after doc edits

data.location: autvestor/engine/ — backtest.py (causal precompute, sells-before-buys, rebalance gates, drawdown-halt-to-cash), bus.py (message bus), montecarlo.py, passive.py (buy_and_keep_curve).
data.name: Event-driven backtest engine

data.example: An oracle test (perfect next-day direction) yields +154% vs +15% buy-and-hold, proving the engine rewards timing. When a method underperforms, suspect the signal/fees, not the engine. buy_and_hold leading after fees is the expected, honest result, not a bug.
data.name: Engine is oracle-validated — don't blame it first

data.example: Errors in cache/persistence side-paths are swallowed (best-effort, must never raise into callers); trading/engine errors are never swallowed.
data.name: Error handling by path

data.rationale: engine/backtest.py precomputes causal ensemble signals, sells-before-buys, gates on rebalance band/frequency, and on a drawdown breach flattens to cash; bus.py decouples strategy/risk/execution; montecarlo.py gives probabilistic risk/return. Oracle-validated (see convention inv-engine-oracle-validated).
data.title: Event-driven backtest engine with a message bus

data.location: autvestor/execution/ — PaperBroker/BacktestBroker (fee_bps+slippage_bps per fill), base protocol; live.py AlpacaBroker (account/positions/orders/ACH transfers) + PROVIDERS registry; IBKR secondary.
data.name: Execution + broker layer

data.rationale: Every simulated trade pays realistic commission (10 bps) + slippage (5 bps); results reported as currency profit net of fees. Benchmark forensics showed fee drag decides real-world rankings and swamps thin directional edges (active methods trade at ~49-52% accuracy).
data.title: Rank strategies by money net of fees, not percentages

data.statement: Import numba/torch/redis lazily and degrade gracefully (numpy / in-process backends); never hard-require an optional dependency.

Real-money actions require layered consent: explicit flag (--confirm / paper:false) AND AUTVESTOR_CONFIRM_LIVE=yes AND a configured login, with an audit_log entry. Paper/backtest is the default everywhere; live UI callbacks and the trade loop must call auth.require_live_auth()/ensure_live_allowed().

data.location: autvestor/live/loop.py — run_trading_cycle/run_trading_loop (fetch -> signal -> allocate -> risk -> diff -> orders -> persist); re-fetches bars+news each cycle; drawdown breach flattens+halts; live-consent gated. CLI trade-loop (--synthetic for offline).
data.name: Recurrent trading loop

data.location: autvestor/modes/ — 14 built-ins (tsmom, xs_momentum, mean_reversion, markov, fft, kalman, hurst, perm_entropy, info_theory, temporal_ising(inverse_ising), news/audience_sentiment, copy_trading, buy_and_hold) + trend_overlay/dual_momentum overlays + Ensemble (weighted_avg/majority_vote/perf_weighted/regime_gated/mi_weighted).
data.name: Strategy modes + Ensemble

data.rationale: Each mode implements a common Protocol (modes/base.py: name/fit/signal -> DataFrame in [-1,1]) and registers in REGISTRY (build_mode). An Ensemble combines any selection by voting (weighted_avg/majority_vote/perf_weighted/regime_gated/mi_weighted) so the whole can beat its parts.
data.title: Strategies are plug-in modes combined by an Ensemble

data.statement: Report net profit + fees/slippage in currency (not just %); thread fee_bps/slippage_bps/rebalance_band/rebalance_every through any new config surface (CLI flag + UI control + YAML).
Never commit credentials.yaml, data/autvestor.db, output/, or .coverage (all gitignored). Broker keys live only in the git-ignored credentials file.

data.rationale: The benchmark buy_and_hold was vol-targeted (~60-80% invested), halving returns. Added buy_and_keep (equal-weight once, no vol scaling, rebalance_every=1e9). On 5y/10+5bps: buy_and_keep +$132.8k(34%DD) > buy_and_hold +$64.3k(19%DD) > copy experts +$59.9k > tsmom +$4.8k > most active negative. Both passives ~Sharpe 0.80 — the dollar lead is exposure/leverage, not timing; rank by Sharpe. Do not re-derive.
data.title: Honest passive baseline: buy_and_keep + rank by Sharpe

data.location: autvestor/portfolio/ — equal_weight, hrp (hierarchical risk parity), ising_select, plus min_variance, risk_parity (ERC), black_litterman on Ledoit-Wolf-shrunk covariance.
data.name: Portfolio allocators

data.example: modes (REGISTRY/build_mode), portfolio (build_allocator), execution (PROVIDERS) all use a Protocol + registry. New component: implement the protocol, register it, never special-case downstream.
data.name: Protocol + registry pattern everywhere

data.location: autvestor/risk/ — vol_target, kelly, drawdown stop, guards (concentration/leverage caps, circuit breakers that halt trading).
data.name: Risk guards

data.rationale: benchmarks/stats.py reports the Deflated Sharpe Ratio (Bailey & Lopez de Prado) to correct for the best-of-~20-methods selection bias, plus bootstrap p-values, information ratio, and walk-forward / purged k-fold splits for leakage-free out-of-sample testing.
data.title: Report Deflated Sharpe Ratio + leakage-free OOS stats

data.rationale: Tracking DB uses sqlite3; OIDC (google/apple) auth uses httpx + flask session (no authlib/pyjwt). Acceleration/cache deps (numba, torch, redis) are optional extras that must degrade to numpy / in-process backends; offline synthetic data is the default.
data.title: Stdlib-only storage + OIDC auth; optional deps degrade gracefully

data.location: autvestor/storage/db.py — data/autvestor.db (gitignored): users, auth_identities, broker_accounts, config_profiles, runs, orders, fills, equity_points, signal_snapshots, news_items, append-only audit_log.
data.name: SQLite tracking database

data.title: Ongoing strategy finetuning + production hardening on branch dev/finetuning (v0.1.0 baseline)

data.example: .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -q (289+ tests, ~5s); coverage via --cov=autvestor --cov-report=term-missing; hypothesis property tests. venv is uv-managed: install extras with `uv pip install <pkg> --python .venv/Scripts/python.exe` (no pip inside the venv).
data.name: Test + venv invocation

data.location: autvestor/ui/ — Dash app (5 tabs, (?) help on every control, scoped auth + OIDC google/apple, wsgi.py for gunicorn, :8050); autvestor/api/app.py optional FastAPI REST (:8000) for mobile/agents/scripts.
data.name: Dash web app + optional FastAPI

data.example: Each new Dash control/button needs a HELP_TEXTS entry (a test enforces it); fields via _field, buttons via _action; pure-CSS Details popovers with no extra callbacks. Live-money actions must call auth.require_live_auth().
data.name: Every UI control has a help entry

data.statement: No per-bar Python loops in signal paths; vectorize (sliding_window_view, offset bincount, batched matmul/bmm). Pin every new numeric kernel with an equivalence-to-reference test at machine precision (atol ~1e-10).

data.name: Autvestor
data.summary: Quant investment research platform: strategy modes, event-driven backtesting, paper trading (in-process PaperBroker), FastAPI + Dash UI.

data.rationale: User rule: everything decided automatically unless explicitly pinned. autvestor/decision.py select_strategy: eligible = combos seen in >=2 cycles with worst drawdown <= DRYRUN_RISK_TOLERANCE (default 20%); winner = best mean Sharpe (mean return tiebreak); explicit env/config always overrides. Every selection and every order carries a human-readable rationale (TradeDecision in types.py; dca_decisions.csv; UI Decisions tab with flow diagram + risk slider). Data fetch is a fallback chain Yahoo->Stooq->Tiingo(TIINGO_API_TOKEN)->cached-last-good; Stooq is JS-bot-blocked from the homelab IP, Tiingo key is on the user's manual_todo.md. Verified 2026-07-10: cycle 1 default ensemble, cycle 2 auto-picked info_theory/equal_weight with rationale.
data.title: Strategy is auto-selected from dry-run evidence under a user risk tolerance

data.rationale: (1) history.csv gains __market__/hold rows each cycle = real history with zero decisions (equal-notional hold after warmup); select_strategy only picks an active combo if it beats the baseline mean Sharpe, else 'hold the market' with rationale. (2) dca_decisions.csv accumulates across cycles (cycle_started+strategy cols, trimmed 5000). (3) Identity = Authelia Remote-User header copied by caddy forward-auth; UI shows a user badge, saves risk_tolerance/daily_contribution per user into SQLite UserStore (WAL, shared output volume); dryrun runs as DRYRUN_OWNER=admin reading those settings each cycle; precedence saved-pins > env > auto. API URL invest-api.ohje.ooguy.com defined in OPNsense caddy.d -> cloud.vm:8052; bearer token only in cloud.vm ~/invest/deploy/.env (chmod 600).
data.title: Decisions compare against a market baseline; runs are per-user via Authelia Remote-User + SQLite

data.rationale: User rule: manage.vm manages hardware/server only, money workloads live on cloud.vm (like Firefly). Stack deployed at s@cloud.vm:~/invest (git archive over ssh; no rsync on coding.vm). compose uses network_mode bridge because cloud.vm docker address pools are exhausted. API auth = AUTVESTOR_API_TOKEN bearer (constant-time compare in FastAPI middleware, /health open) because programmatic clients cannot SSO — same pattern as omnigraph API; token in cloud.vm ~/invest/deploy/.env (never committed). UI stays Authelia two_factor. Caddy routes invest/invest-api.ohje.ooguy.com -> cloud.vm:8050/8052, deployed to OPNsense caddy.d via scp + configctl caddy reload (graceful, no restart). Engine supports DCA: BrokerConfig.daily_contribution + starting_cash 0; dryrun is a PIPELINE test (fetch/simulate/dca stages, pipeline.json health), not strategy selection; UI has a Dry Run tab. Image floor ~400MB (scipy+numpy+pandas+plotly), <50MB impossible in Python.
data.title: Autvestor stack runs on cloud.vm; API uses bearer auth, UI uses Authelia

data.rationale: Money-adjacent service, so: multi-stage python:3.12-slim image (456MB, no pip/compilers in runtime), fixed non-root UID 10001, read_only rootfs, cap_drop ALL, no-new-privileges, noexec tmpfs, mem/pid limits. dryrun loops every 6h: fetch Yahoo daily bars -> full simulation grid -> append output/dryrun/history.csv (walk-forward dry test; PaperBroker only, no broker credentials exist). UI needs AUTVESTOR_WORKSPACE env var because ROOT_DIR resolves into site-packages under pip install. Proxy via OPNsense os-caddy: invest/invest-api.ohje.ooguy.com, Authelia-gated (UI has no native login). First real-data grid (2026-07-10, 372 runs): info_theory on cross_asset_etfs best single (Sharpe 2.77); buy_and_hold+fft+temporal_ising ensemble most robust across datasets; markov/fft/temporal_ising standalone are negative-Sharpe.
data.title: Ship dry testing as a hardened 3-service Docker stack (ui/api/dryrun)

data.rationale: stats.py re-scores each grid run on the tail 25% of its equity curve (segment=holdout rows in results.db history); select_strategy ranks on holdout when present; __market__ baseline (equal-notional hold) scored full+holdout is the floor - no active combo beating it means hold-the-market. method_stats per cycle (selection counts, sharpe contribution) to prune methods. min_order_notional (DRYRUN_MIN_ORDER=5) cuts churn on the 10/day pot. Aligns with earlier inv-significance-dsr intent; full DSR/CPCV/PBO arrive with the Rust decision crate (M4).
data.title: Selection ranks on out-of-sample holdout segments vs a market baseline; method stats tracked for pruning

data.statement: Money/finance workloads run on cloud.vm; manage.vm only manages hardware/server concerns (Authelia config lives there because Authelia does). API auth = bearer token, never SSO, for programmatic surfaces.

data.rationale: Plan docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-10-rust-migration-plan.md. axum+rusqlite(bundled)+serde+nalgebra+rust_decimal; SQLite files are the cross-language contract; parity via golden fixtures vs Python (M1+M2 done: 72 tests, HRP matches Python to 1e-9; M3 engine + M5a providers in progress via subagents). Rollout swaps containers one at a time in the same compose (dryrun -> api -> retire Dash). Target image 5-20MB vs 407MB Python. rustup at ~/.cargo on coding.vm.
data.title: Full Rust rewrite: 8-crate workspace, static musl binary, drop Ising/HMM/FFT/sentiment, add TSMOM + DSR/CPCV/PBO gates

data.rationale: autvestor/storage.py ResultsStore: history/dca_history/dca_decisions(trim 5000)/dca_equity/pipeline_history/method_stats; ALTER ADD COLUMN schema evolution; one-time CSV migration at startup (verified on cloud.vm: 3000 rows imported); UI reads the store; pipeline.json kept for quick health. Reason: ragged CSVs + concurrent container access. users.db (user_settings) holds per-user risk tolerance/daily contribution keyed by Authelia Remote-User; owner=admin drives the continuous run. invest UI = Authelia one_factor since 2026-07-10 (2FA deactivated per user, TOTP infra kept).
data.title: Dryrun persistence in SQLite results.db (WAL), not CSVs

data.location: autvestor/users.py; DB at output/users.db on the shared volume
data.name: Per-user settings store (SQLite)

data.title: Global tradeable universe: world/developed/emerging/global-bond datasets; pot default = world_equities
data.rationale: Added world_equities(VT/VEA/VWO/VTI), developed_intl(EFA/VEA/VGK/EWJ), emerging_markets(VWO/EEM/IEMG/FXI), global_bonds(BNDX/AGG/BND/EMB) - all US-listed, Alpaca-tradeable, verified live. DCA default us_index_etfs->world_equities so 'hold the market'=hold the WORLD (US-only is concentration risk). SPY benchmark kept; added VT total-world benchmark2 (/dash/benchmark2). Live: pot world +4.7% vs SPY +8.7% vs VT +8.1% - honest no-edge-yet, diversification+cash drag vs single best index.

data.title: UI: risk-vs-return scatter, money headline in EUR+%, explained Settings
data.rationale: Performance page: 'Return vs risk' scatter (return-on-money-in vs worst drawdown, up-left=better) + table (return, drawdown, return/drawdown ratio, Sharpe). Overview money: 4 cards (Invested/Contributed/PnL/vs-saver) each EUR AND %, verdict with absolute EUR, sparkline replaced by proper mini line chart with x/y ticks. Settings: every control has inline plain-language explanation (risk tolerance, daily contribution, mode pins, allocator). 375 tests.

data.title: LLM advisory layer: explainer + gate toggles + optional sentiment (default-off, gate-subordinate)
data.rationale: crates/decision/advisory.rs + advisory tables (explanations/sentiment_signals/llm_audit) + users.db disabled_gates. 3 features default OFF (reuse llm.rs/DeepSeek): explain stage (LLM_ADVISORY_ENABLED, Overview 'In plain words'), user gate toggles (disabling prepends 'EVIDENCE LOWERED' warning; Settings checkboxes+fldhelp), sentiment stage (LLM_SENTIMENT_ENABLED, [0,1] tighten-only, property-tested). LLM never trades/overrides-gate/loosens/buys; apply_gate_override sole funding authority. 406 tests. Enable via manual_todo 8a. Design: docs/research/2026-07-16-multi-agent-llm-layer-design.md.

data.title: Session drop was Authelia inactivity:5m/expiration:1h -> set both to 48h
data.rationale: The 'page lost after a few minutes + re-login on reload' was Authelia (NOT Caddy): session inactivity 5m logged users out when idle, expiration 1h capped it. Set both to 48h (remember_me stays 1M) on manage.vm ~/auth + Server repo. Belt-and-suspenders: dashboard now auto-refreshes every 45s (REFRESH_MS) which keeps the session alive via /dash/settings heartbeat + pauses when tab hidden; feed() shows a #sessionBanner on 401/redirect instead of blanking.

data.title: Dashboard: dual SPY+VT benchmarks, interactive risk-return scatter, drag-to-zoom, explainer de-emphasized
data.rationale: Performance overlay + risk-return scatter/table show 3 tracks (Pot, US saver SPY --series-3, World saver VT --series-4 purple) from /dash/benchmark + /dash/benchmark2. scatterChart interactive (hover tooltip: return/drawdown/ratio/Sharpe). lineChart engine gained drag-to-zoom (chart.zoom={lo,hi}, reset via dblclick/button/Esc, cleared on new data not on auto-refresh). LLM explainer de-emphasized: hidden when off, LLM layer reframed as optional NEWS-SENTIMENT risk overlay (explainer = secondary off-by-default toggle). 409 tests, image 8.08MB.

data.title: MIGRATE: per CLAUDE.md, move invest memory to its own `invest` omnigraph graph (OMNIGRAPH_GRAPH_ID=invest); each project its own graph; shared memory = global Preferences only. Deferred to session boundary (MCP repoint needs Claude restart). Seed is the current durable backstop.
